title: Onyxia API catalog
summary: Catalog of internal and external APIs, including Kafka/event streams, to make service connections explicit.

security.notes: The catalog must record auth type, scopes, rate limits, and environment boundaries.

blockers: Decision needed: separate API catalog or facet of contributor catalog.

notes: Onyxia region already has a Kafka runtime field; the contributor catalog should describe API/event assets around that runtime capability.
